channel.title: Developer-Tools on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Developer-Tools on Arrans github.io

item.title: terrastruct/d2
item.description: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Continue is the leading open-source AI code assistant. You can connect any models and any context to build custom autocomplete and chat experiences inside VS Code and JetBrains

item.title: localstack/localstack
item.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

item.title: princeton-nlp/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using GPT-4, or your LM of choice. It solves 12.47% of bugs in the SWE-bench evaluation set and takes just 1 minute to run.

item.title: lapce/lapce
item.description: Lightning-fast and Powerful Code Editor written in Rust

item.title: source-foundry/Hack
item.description: A typeface designed for source code

item.title: koalaman/shellcheck
item.description: ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

item.title: Boeing/config-file-validator
item.description: Cross Platform tool to validate configuration files

item.title: risor-io/risor
item.description: Fast and flexible scripting for Go developers and DevOps.

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: danvergara/dblab
item.description: The database client every command line junkie deserves.

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).
